title: Wall Street upside? HSBC sees S&P 500 at 8,000, raises 2026 target as AI boom and tech earnings fuel optimism
description: HSBC raised its 2026 S&P 500 target to 7,650, citing strong corporate earnings and resilient technology stocks. The brokerage said improving AI adoption, broader market participation and easing macro conditions could potentially push the index beyond the 8,000 mark despite lingering inflation and oil price risks.

title: Hassett rules out new agency for AI oversight
Qualcomm Jumps 8%, Micron Pops 4% as AI Semiconductor Rally Enters Parabolic Phase
description: Shares of Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) are up roughly 8% to around $237 in early Monday trading, extending one of the most aggressive multi-week runs in large-cap semis. Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU) is climbing alongside it, up about 4% to around $774. The moves follow a blistering Friday session, when QCOM closed up 8% at $219.09 and MU ... title: MoonPay Acquires Dawn Labs, Debuts AI Trading Tool That Turns Words Into Code
description: BitcoinWorld MoonPay Acquires Dawn Labs, Debuts AI Trading Tool That Turns Words Into Code Global cryptocurrency payments firm MoonPay has acquired Dawn Labs, an artificial intelligence trading startup, and simultaneously launched a new AI-powered trading tool called Dawn CLI. The development marks a significant step in making algorithmic trading accessible to a broader audience, according to details shared with Decrypt. title: Barksdale Federal Credit Union Selects Scienaptic AI to Strengthen Fraud and Anomaly Detection
description: Scienaptic AI, a leading provider of AI-powered credit decisioning, announced that Barksdale Federal Credit Union has selected its platform to enhance origination fraud and anomaly detection to tackle the challenges of identity theft and synthetic identity fraud.
